title: Wire cost_tracking_wrapper into UI as estimated hourly cost
description: cost_tracking_wrapper.py exists but cost data is not surfaced in the UI. Add an estimated hourly cost display (e.g., small badge near session controls). Plan Change 9.

title: Show tool call events in chat UI; unify button design
description: Tool call events (web_fetch, voice_change, etc.) should appear as inline chat messages or collapsible entries. Also do a button design consistency pass across the UI. Plan Change 8.

title: Rename ag2client.js to ducke.js and update ag2.init → ducke.init message type
description: Plan Change 1 specified renaming ag2client.js to ducke.js and updating the ag2.init message type to ducke.init. Currently: the file is still named app/website_files/static/ag2client.js, the JS class is 'ag2client', and both backend (realtime_session.py:162) and frontend (ag2client.js:397) still use 'ag2.init'. The plan notes keeping it compatible was acceptable for initial migration but the rename should be completed. Update: (1) rename file, (2) update class name, (3) change message type to ducke.init in both realtime_session.py and the client JS, (4) update any imports/references in chat.html and main.js.

title: Integrate Agentation library for UI element feedback
description: No evidence of agentation npm package in the frontend. Add agentation toolbar to duck-e's web UI so users can click elements and copy CSS selectors as structured markdown for agent feedback. Plan Change 6. See https://github.com/benjitaylor/agentation
close_reason: Already complete - Agentation already integrated via ESM loading

title: Implement PTT (push-to-talk) unit tests and document feature
description: chat.html includes PTT (push-to-talk) controls (.ptt-controls, .ptt-btn, .ptt-toggle) which are not in the original plan. This is an undocumented enhancement. Add: (1) documentation of the PTT feature in CLAUDE.md, (2) unit/integration tests for the PTT toggle behavior, (3) verify PTT mode works correctly with the voice change reinit flow (audio state must be preserved or restarted correctly when voice changes while in PTT mode).

title: Move footer/version display below the fold in frontend
description: The footer and version badge should be pushed below the fold so they don't occupy prime viewport space. Frontend-only layout change. Plan Change 7.

title: Verify gpt-realtime-2 is the correct OpenAI model identifier
description: Plan Change 2 notes: 'Verify the model name is exactly what OpenAI expects (check API docs for gpt-realtime-2 vs gpt-4o-realtime-preview-2024-12-17 etc.)'. Currently config.py hardcodes 'gpt-realtime-2'. Confirm this is the correct model string by testing against the /v1/realtime/sessions endpoint. If 'gpt-realtime-2' is not valid, update to the correct identifier and document the verified model name in the CLAUDE.md.

title: Add E2E Playwright tests for full voice session flow
description: tests/e2e/test_duck_e_basic.spec.ts exists but appears minimal (only imports Playwright). The plan's testing strategy requires verifying: (Phase 1) WebSocket connects, audio streams, tools execute; (Phase 2) memory persists across sessions, voice changes seamlessly, web fetch returns readable content and rejects private URLs; (Phase 3) tool calls render in transcript, layout scrolls correctly, Agentation toolbar loads. Implement comprehensive E2E tests covering the WebSocket session lifecycle, tool call transcript rendering, cost display update, and voice change reinit flow.

title: Implement Google OAuth for user identity (memory keying)
description: UserMemoryStore is wired and uses forwarded_email header for keying, but there is no Google OAuth provider flow. Implement proper OAuth so memory is keyed to authenticated identity. Plan Change 4.

title: Add unit tests for memory extraction (extract_and_save) and decay logic
description: memory.py implements sophisticated features: (1) LLM-based auto-extraction via extract_and_save() using gpt-5.4-nano, (2) time-based confidence decay with AUTO vs EXPLICIT rates, (3) contradiction detection via LLM comparison. tests/test_memory_extraction.py and tests/test_memory_decay_contradiction.py exist but may be incomplete. Verify coverage of: decay application across periods, contradiction replacement vs refinement, duplicate deduplication, max facts limit enforcement (100), and the extraction prompt returning valid JSON.
